commanded_lines: Action envelope: read-only validation; write only workers/validator-dkr-p2/verification.v1.json and progress.finish.json; no product, git, frame, tree, ledger, release, or external-state changes.

Validation decision: accept exact-head build provenance, retained 0/0/1 controls, scope.run lifecycle evidence, and the fail-closed discovery boundary; reject the allocation method and preserve both unaccepted lifecycle rows.
Downstream decision: only reducing discovery advances; CKR performance, measurement implementation, and optimization remain blocked.
DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
